name: Corn Muffins with Honey Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, powdered milk powder, sugar,
baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
2. Add water, melted margarine, beaten eggs, and lemon juice to the dry ingredients.
Stir until all ingredients are just combined.
3. Pour batter into 24 greased muffin cups, or 18 if using larger-sized tins.
4. Bake at 425°F for 13 to 15 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, mix honey and softened butter together.
6. Serve the honey butter with the hot muffins. Makes 24 muffins.
- Note: If using larger tins, only 18 muffins will be made.
